subcodes.first_line: The servant, present before His Countenance, made mention of thy letter in its entirety, and it was honored to attain His hearing. Praise be unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عبد حاضر امام وجه حاضر نامه شما را تمام ذکر نمود و بشرف اصغا فائز گشت لله
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
